calendar.matters:
Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Dec-01-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Daniel C. Taylor, Esq. appeared on behalf of the insurance carrier, and with petitioner Fiapapalagi Ugapo, who was present as Guardian ad litem for the minor Charlene Matavao, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $7,500.00.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Medical Expenses - $0.00.
Costs - $0.00.

The net balance of $7,500.00 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, Bayview Branch, Third Street, San Francisco, CA. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
